intent.responsibility: Own an editable ordered collection of exact List Item instances.
intent.visualBoundary: Delegate vertical item distribution, gaps and reflow to one exact Collection Stack boundary.
intent.runtimeBehavior: Forward one shared width and height and each item exact Runtime contract to its fixed List Item Variant.
intent.forwarding: Forward itemWidth and itemHeight explicitly to every List Item and preserve each item runtime document unchanged.
intent.temporalOwnership: Own item presence and collection reflow while every List Item retains its owner-relative internal timeline.

component.name: List
component.notes: Vertical collection of List Item instances with stable identity and presence.

metadata.note: List repeats List Item through Collection Stack; the List owns vertical flow and item presence only.
